ab: anema uri su pakazuanan a sema tapav?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: unting aken ta sidusiya a sema tapav.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: anema uri pakazuanan a sema biyuing nimadju?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: djemavac timadju a sema biyuing.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: anema uri su pakazuanan a sema bukutu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: maka hikuki aken a sema bukutu. maka hikuki aken a sema bukutu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: anema uri su pakazuanan a sema bukutu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: uri maka gungkang aken a sema bukutu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: anema uri su pakazuanan a tjumaq?
en: How do you go home?

ab: uri maka kisiya ken a tjumaq.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: anema uri pakazuanan ni Sauniyaw a sema gakku?
en: How does Sauniyaw go to school?

ab: uri maka kisia ti Saniyaw a sema gakku.
en: Saniyaw goes to school by train.

ab: anema uri pakazuanan ni Api a sema kiyukai?
en: How does Api go to church?

ab: uri maka palidring ti Api a sema kiyukai.
en: Api goes to church by bicycle.

ab: a namaka Jiyin sun a sema gakku?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ini, uri maka basu aken a sema gakku.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: a namaka palidring sun a sema gakku?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ui, namaka palidring aken a sema gakku.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: a namaka kauti sun a sema Takav?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ui, uri maka kauti aken a sema Takav.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: a namaka kisiya sun manu namaka hikuki sun a sema Kacedas?
ch: A+:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: a namaka kisiya sun manu namaka hikuki sun a sema Taitu?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?

ab: namaka hikuki aken, tja djaljav a maka hikuku tua kisiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: a namaka basu sun manu naunting sun tua haiya a sema kiyukai?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: naunting aken tua haiya a sema kiyukai, tja djaljav a unting tua maka basu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: a djemet a siyubai tua nu umaq?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: inika djemet, maka utubatubai aken a sema siyubai.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: a djemet a iyubingkiyuku tua gakku?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: djemet, djemavac itjen satje djemaljun.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: a djemet a kakanan tua tisaba?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: djemavac itjen a palamu satje djemaljun.
ch: B:出車站再走一下就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
